text.title: Vendor Feature Portability Matrix Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Vendor Feature Portability Matrix application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Matrix uses a closed feature taxonomy (≥8 rows: tool use / JSON mode / streaming / vision / batch / caching / fine-tune / safety filter).

rationale.source: Vendor Feature Portability Matrix authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Open enums make matrices incomparable across vendors and across versions.

rule.statement: Each cell carries evidence (link to doc OR eval row OR test trace).

rationale.source: Vendor Feature Portability Matrix authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Without evidence, the matrix is opinion and goes stale within weeks.

rule.statement: For each non-parity cell, the matrix records migration delta + risk + cost.

rationale.source: Vendor Feature Portability Matrix authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Aggregate 'migrate-or-not' decisions hide the per-feature cost; per-cell delta is auditable.

rule.statement: Matrix names a single accountable owner with rotation; refresh cadence documented.

rationale.source: Vendor Feature Portability Matrix authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Plural ownership = no ownership; refresh cadence prevents staleness.

rule.statement: Matrix is a versioned snapshot with last_reviewed; vendor changes drop a delta record.

rationale.source: Vendor Feature Portability Matrix authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Vendor feature surfaces move fast; un-versioned matrices mis-route within a quarter.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
